_setup_instructions.client_path: Where to write the Inngest client singleton. Default assumes Next.js src/ + App Router. Change if your project uses app/ without src/, or Pages Router.
_setup_instructions.route_path: Where to write the Inngest serve() handler. For App Router, ends in route.ts. For Pages Router, use pages/api/inngest.ts and the templates need light adjustment (default export instead of named GET/POST/PUT exports).
_setup_instructions.events_dir: Directory for typed event definitions. One file per domain (e.g., events/shop.ts, events/user.ts).
_setup_instructions.functions_dir: Directory for function definitions plus the registry index.ts.
_setup_instructions.schema_library: Either 'zod' (runtime validation at boundaries) or 'static' (compile-time only, no Zod dependency). The event template branches on this.
_setup_instructions.app_id: Stable kebab-case ID for this Inngest app, written into client.ts. NEVER change after deploy — Inngest associates run history with this ID. Example: 'acme-storefront'.
